text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pfft! What even? Ahaha! This is so not fair!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, Trainer! My mom sent me a picture
of my little sisters and... Ahaha! Their faces are so
silly!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
When I have a race coming up, she tries to make
me laugh by sending pictures like this. Well, she
sure got me this time! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I think she's saying, "Get out there with that smile
of yours and have fun!" Hehe, can't let her down
now, can I? ♪
